title: Discounted Electric Service - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Utility Assistance > Discounted Electric Service 6 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CITY OF ASHLAND ASHLAND MUNICIPAL UTILITY LOW INCOME UTILITIES DISCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers electric, water, and sewer discount program. The discount is 30% with a maximum of $400 each year. Participants must apply yearly. Program year is from July 1-June 30. 2245 Ashland Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Household income at or below 200% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Office: Tuesday/Friday 9am-1pm Email (541) 488-6004 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COLUMBIA RIVER PUD PUD ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides emergency financial assistance for electric bills and discount programs. The Income-Qualified Senior Discount provides a $20.00 discount on the monthly base charge on eligible customers' bills and 10% discount on the energy charges. The Special Waiver Program provides a $20.00 discount on the monthly base charge for eligible customers. Participants must be recertified annually to keep the waiver. The Glow Fund provides emergency bill payment assistance (the program is based on current funding availability). 64001 Columbia River Highway Deer Island, OR 97054 Eligibility: Emergency Bill Payment Assistance: - Must be a CRPUD customer, and meet the state of Oregon guidelines for energy assistance of at or below 60% of state median income. Income-Qualified Senior Discount: - Must be a CRPUD customer, and meet the state of Oregon guidelines for energy assistance of at or below 60% of state median income. - Age 62 and older. Special Waiver Program: - Must be a CRPUD customer, and meet the state of Oregon guidelines for energy assistance of at or below 60% of state median income. Glow Fund Program: - Must be a CRPUD customer, and meet the state of Oregon guidelines for energy assistance of at or below 60% of state median income. - Must be up for disconnection for non-payment or currently disconnected for non-payment. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-5:30pm Email (503) 397-1844 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY ENERGY PROJECT LOW INCOME COMMUNITY SOLAR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers monthly electric bill credits with a discounted subscription to the Oregon Community Solar Program. Designed to expand solar access and lower utility costs. The subscription to a solar "farm" allows access to solar energy for people who don't have the physical space or financial resources for a solar installation, people who live in condos or apartments, and people who rent or move around a lot. 2705 E Burnside Street Suite 112 Portland, OR 97214 Eligibility: Residential customers of Portland General Electric, Pacific Power, or Idaho Power with an active account in their name and service address where they live. Must meet income requirements. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (971) 544-8718 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LANE COUNTY HUMAN SERVICE DIVISION LIHEAP WAITLIST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Lane County Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program (LIHEAP) waitlist access point for winter warming and summer cooling, which includes electrical, natural gas, and heating fuel until capacity is reached. 151 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Most utility assistance programs: 60% of Area Median Income Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm Email (541) 682-3378 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PACIFIC POWER OREGON LOW-INCOME DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an ongoing, monthly discount on Pacific Power electric bills. Discount level varies based on income level. Discount applies in addition to any other assistance received. 825 NE Multnomah Street Suite 550 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Households at or below 60% State Median Income (SMI) Hours: Not applicable (888) 221-7070 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PORTLAND GENERAL ELECTRIC INCOME-QUALIFIED BILL DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an ongoing monthly discount between 15% and 80% on PGE bills. The discount applies in addition to any other assistance received. 121 SW Salmon Street Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Low-income households at or below 60% State Median Income (SMI) Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-7pm (503) 228-6322 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF ASHLAND LOW INCOME UTILITIES DISCOUNT COLUMBIA RIVER PUD PUD ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS COMMUNITY ENERGY PROJECT LOW INCOME COMMUNITY SOLAR LANE COUNTY HUMAN SERVICE DIVISION LIHEAP WAITLIST PACIFIC POWER OREGON LOW-INCOME DISCOUNT PROGRAM PORTLAND GENERAL ELECTRIC INCOME-QUALIFIED BILL DISCOUNT PROGRAM
